creationInfo.comment:
This SPDX document was created from CMake 3.30.5, using the qt
build system from https://code.qt.io/cgit/qt/qtbase.git/tree/cmake/QtPublicSbomHelpers.cmake

hasExtractedLicensingInfos.extractedText:
Licensees holding valid commercial Qt licenses may use this software in
accordance with the the terms contained in a written agreement between
you and The Qt Company. Alternatively, the terms and conditions that were
accepted by the licensee when buying and/or downloading the
software do apply.

For the latest licensing terms and conditions, see https://www.qt.io/terms-conditions.
For further information use the contact form at https://www.qt.io/contact-us.

packages.comment:
Built by CMake 3.30.5 with RelWithDebInfo configuration for Linux (x86_64)
qtwayland was configured with:
    qt-configure-module <sources>/qtwayland -- -DFFMPEG_DIR=/usr/local/FFmpeg-n7.1.3 -DQT_DEPLOY_FFMPEG=TRUE -DINPUT_headersclean=ON -DQT_INSTALL_CONFIG_INFO_FILES=ON -DQT_GENERATE_SBOM=ON -DQT_GENERATE_SOURCE_SBOM=ON -DQT_SBOM_REQUIRE_GENERATE_CYDX_V1_6=ON -DQT_SBOM_VERIFY_CYDX_V1_6=ON -DQT_SBOM_PYTHON_INTERP= -DQT_SBOM_PYTHON_APPS_PATH=/usr/local/bin -DQT_LINT_SOURCE_SBOM=ON -DQT_INTERNAL_SBOM_DEFAULT_CHECKS=ON -DQT_INTERNAL_SBOM_AUDIT=ON -DQT_INTERNAL_SBOM_AUDIT_NO_ERROR=ON -DQT_BUILD_TESTS=OFF -DCMAKE_AUTOGEN_VERBOSE=ON -DCMAKE_MESSAGE_LOG_LEVEL=STATUS -DCMAKE_C_COMPILER_LAUNCHER=sccache -DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_LAUNCHER=sccache
packages.copyrightText: Copyright (C) The Qt Company Ltd. and other contributors.
packages.name: qtwayland

packages.comment:
CMake target name: WaylandCompositor_Attribution_wayland-ivi-extension-protocol
    Information extracted from:
     /src_dir/qtwayland/src/3rdparty/protocol/ivi/qt_attribution.json
    Entry index: 0
    Id: wayland-ivi-extension-protocol
    Name: Wayland IVI Extension Protocol
    Description: "Wayland IVI Extension" is forked from IVI Layer Management to define a common set of APIs by wayland style protocol and provide reference implementation which can be loaded on Weston.
    Qt usage: Used in the Qt Wayland Compositor, and the Qt Wayland platform plugin.
    License: MIT License
    License file: MIT.txt
packages.copyrightText:
Copyright (C) 2013 DENSO CORPORATION
Copyright (c) 2013 BMW Car IT GmbH
packages.name: WaylandCompositor_Attribution_wayland-ivi-extension-protocol
